calendar.matters:
Petition For Redress Of Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And For Order Directing Trustee To Re-Allocate Trust Investments (Probate Code Sec 16336.5(B))
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Directing Conversion Of Net Income Trusts To Unitrusts
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Betty Epstein Guardian Ad Litem for Remainder Beneficiaries. Sil Reggiardo appeared by telephone for Thomas Duryea (Petitioner). Malcolm Mackenzie appeared by telephone for Lorraine Vidal (Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to conversion of the Trusts into Unitrusts, investment of the assets and future distributions. The Petition for Order Directing Conversion of Trusts was taken under submission. The Petition for Redress of Breach of Fidiciary Duty was continued to January 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Reggiardo is to submit a revised order which is to include Ms. Epstein's fees.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

Petition For Redress Of Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And For Order Directing Trustee To Re-Allocate Trust Investments (Probate Code Sec 16336.5(B))

Petition For Order Directing Conversion Of Net Income Trusts To Unitrusts
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Continued To Nov-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Conversion Of Net Income Trusts To Unitrusts

Petition For Order Directing Conversion Of Net Income Trusts To Unitrusts
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Continued To Oct-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Directing Conversion Of Net Income Trusts To Unitrusts
Off Calendar Aug-05-2011 Continued To Sep-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Silvio Reggiardo for Petitioners. Malcolm Mackenzie for Lorraine Vidal.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission with the option of continuing the matter for the Court to think about appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem. If a Guardian Ad Litem is appointed, the matter will be continued and the Guradian Ad Litem will be identified. If one is not appointed, then the matter will be under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
